pom.xml.general_idea: Upgrade the Spring Boot parent version to 3.3.13 to align with the Java 17 migration.
pom.xml.why_exists: Spring Boot 3.x requires Java 17 as the baseline; using Spring Boot 2.x with Java 17 may lead to compatibility issues or missing features, and the migration recipe explicitly targets Spring Boot 3.3.

pom.xml.general_idea: Update the Java version property from 11 to 17 to target the new JDK.
pom.xml.why_exists: The project must compile and run on Java 17; keeping java.version at 11 would cause the build to target the wrong bytecode version or fail if the build tool enforces JDK alignment.

src/main/java/com/example/demo/advice/Ap.general_idea: Migrate validation imports from javax.validation to jakarta.validation to align with Jakarta EE namespace changes in Spring Boot 3.
src/main/java/com/example/demo/advice/Ap.why_exists: javax.validation package is removed in Jakarta EE 9+; code fails to compile with 'package javax.validation does not exist' error.

src/main/java/com/example/demo/controlle.general_idea: Migrate validation annotation import from javax to jakarta namespace to align with Jakarta EE 9+ standards required by Spring Boot 3.
src/main/java/com/example/demo/controlle.why_exists: Compile error: package javax.validation does not exist in the classpath when using Spring Boot 3 / Jakarta EE 9+ dependencies.

src/main/java/com/example/demo/model/Use.general_idea: Migrate JPA annotations from javax.persistence to jakarta.persistence package.
src/main/java/com/example/demo/model/Use.why_exists: javax.persistence package is removed in Jakarta EE 9+ (Spring Boot 3), causing compile errors for missing classes.

src/main/java/com/example/demo/model/Use.general_idea: Migrate validation annotations from javax.validation to jakarta.validation package.
src/main/java/com/example/demo/model/Use.why_exists: javax.validation package is removed in Jakarta EE 9+ (Spring Boot 3), causing compile errors for missing classes.
